mainText:
Promo: "Bank of Entitlement: Where your wants are needs and your needs are already fulfilled!"

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, picture this-I'm strolling down the street, looking as fabulous as ever, when suddenly a pigeon dares to drop a load on my brand-new designer suit. The audacity! I immediately storm into the nearest cafe and demand to speak to the manager. I declare, in my most authoritative tone, that this establishment owes me not just a new suit, but a full wardrobe overhaul, complete with accessories to match. The manager, clearly intimidated by my presence, frantically agrees to my demands and offers to cover all expenses. As I walk out of that cafe, head held high, in my upgraded outfit, I can't help but smirk in triumph. Another victory for Hot Josh, the epitome of entitlement!
